title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 40–44, this part focuses on Unknown person #37, Unknown person #38, Unknown person #39, Unknown person #40 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A flame like that won't even be enough...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: ...to burn the skin of my palm...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Next time, I'm gonna overcome that ability of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Hey, he fell into the sea!
